title: Automatic Enhancement of Cell Models to Enable Conditional Stuck-at Fault Simulation and Pattern Generation
authors: Reza Khoshzaban, Nikolaos I. Deligiannis, Iacopo Guglielminetti, Michelangelo Grosso, Riccardo Cantoro
abstract: Automatic test pattern generation (ATPG) and fault simulation methods for stuck-at faults (SAFs) cannot accurately capture the behavior of conditional stuck-at faults (CSAFs), which manifest only under specific input combinations. To manage such conditional faults using conventional stuck-at fault simulators and test pattern generators, we propose a methodology that embeds conditional fault behavior directly into the logic description of standard cells. The method operates on conditional stuck-at fault models, which define the output variations of a cell in the presence of specific conditional faults for all input stimuli. Each cell model is translated into a Boolean equation that represent the internal logic conditions required to activate the associated faults. This equation is then integrated into the functional description of the standard cell, without modifying its primary inputs, outputs, or intended behavior. As a result, the augmented standard cell library can reproduce the effects of conditional stuck-at faults while remaining compatible with existing fault simulation and ATPG tools. The proposed method incurs negligible application time, and experiments on several benchmark circuits and cores demonstrate reasonable overhead in test pattern count and CPU time.
title_zh: 单元模型的自动增强以实现条件固定故障仿真和测试图形生成
abstract_zh: 针对固定型故障（SAFs）的自动测试图形生成（ATPG）和故障仿真方法无法准确捕捉仅在特定输入组合下才显现的条件性固定型故障（CSAFs）的行为。为了利用传统的固定型故障仿真器和测试图形生成工具来处理此类条件性故障，我们提出了一种方法，将条件性故障行为直接嵌入标准单元的逻辑描述中。该方法基于条件性固定型故障模型，这些模型定义了在特定条件性故障存在时，单元输出随所有输入激励的变化情况。每个单元模型被转换为一个布尔方程，用以表示激活相关故障所需的内部逻辑条件。该方程随后被整合进标准单元的功能描述中，且不改变其原有的主输入、主输出或预期功能。因此，增强后的标准单元库能够在保持与现有故障仿真和ATPG工具兼容的同时，重现条件性固定型故障的影响。所提方法的应用时间开销极小，对多个基准电路和核心的实验结果表明，其在测试图形数量和CPU时间方面均带来了合理的额外开销。

title: Counting Minimal Unique-Cause MC/DC Test Suites for Boolean Decisions
authors: Robin Lee, Youngho Nam
abstract: Unique-Cause Modified Condition/Decision Coverage (UC MC/DC) is a widely used structural adequacy criterion for safety-critical software decisions. For a Boolean decision with N atomic conditions, the theoretically minimal suite size under the one-bit witness interpretation is N +1, which is exponentially smaller than exhaustive Multiple Condition Coverage. Minimality, however, does not imply uniqueness: a single decision may admit many distinct optimal suites, while another may admit only one or none. This paper defines minimal-suite multiplicity, denoted μ(f), as the number of distinct size-(N+1) minimal suites for a decision f , together with a feasibility-constrained variant μ(f; F). Two complementary counting views are developed: a graph-theoretic model based on colored witness edges of the Boolean hypercube, and a propositional model-counting encoding that counts minimal suites without enumerating all 2N assignments. Exact counting is shown to be #P-complete in general under feasibility constraints. In the empirical study, exact labeled-tree enumeration remained practical for N ∈ {4, 5, 6, 7} with median runtimes of 1.9×10−4 s, 1.3×10−3 s, 1.5×10−2 s, and 2.3×10−1 s per instance, respectively. A supplementary solver-based study on repeated-variable B2 instances extended the scalability picture beyond this range: exact projected counting with Ganak completed all tested cases at N = 8 and N = 10, with timeouts beginning at N = 12, while ApproxMC solved selected instances up to N = 30 but with strong instance sensitivity. Across fixed N, multiplicity varied by several orders of magnitude, and feasibility constraints sharply reduced the surviving space of optimal suites. These results position multiplicity as a quantitative indicator of robustness and substitutability among optimal UC MC/DC evidence.
title_zh: 布尔决策的最小唯一原因MC/DC测试套件计数
abstract_zh:
唯一原因修改条件/判定覆盖（UC MC/DC）是安全关键软件决策中广泛使用的一种结构化充分性准则。对于包含 N 个原子条件的布尔决策，根据单比特见证解释，理论上最小测试套件规模为 N + 1，这比穷举的多重条件覆盖（Multiple Condition Coverage）呈指数级更小。然而，最小性并不意味着唯一性：某些决策可能允许多个不同的最优测试套件，而另一些则可能仅允许一个或无任何满足条件的套件。本文定义了“最小套件重数”（minimal-suite multiplicity），记作 μ(f)，表示针对某个决策 f 的不同大小为 (N+1) 的最小测试套件的数量，并进一步提出一种受可行性约束的变体 μ(f; F)。本文发展了两种互补的计数视角：一种基于布尔超立方体上着色见证边的图论模型，另一种是命题模型计数编码方法，可在不枚举全部 2^N 个赋值的情况下统计最小套件数量。研究表明，在可行性约束下，精确计数问题在一般情况下属于 #P-完全问题。

在实证研究中，对 N ∈ {4, 5, 6, 7} 的情况，精确的标记树枚举方法仍具实用性，每实例的中位运行时间分别为 1.9×10⁻⁴ 秒、1.3×10⁻³ 秒、1.5×10⁻² 秒 和 2.3×10⁻¹ 秒。一项补充性的基于求解器的研究针对含有重复变量的 B2 实例扩展了可扩展性分析：使用 Ganak 进行精确投影计数在 N = 8 和 N = 10 时成功完成了所有测试用例，而在 N = 12 时开始出现超时；ApproxMC 则能在部分实例上解决至 N = 30，但表现出强烈的实例敏感性。在固定 N 下，重数差异可达多个数量级，且可行性约束显著缩小了可行的最优套件空间。这些结果表明，重数可作为衡量最优 UC MC/DC 证据之间鲁棒性与可替代性的量化指标。

title: Software Diversity in Resource-Constrained Embedded Systems
authors: Kush Dave, Ian G. Harris
abstract: Resource-constrained embedded devices often lack the security measures against Return-Oriented Programming (ROP) attacks, like Address Space Layout Randomization (ASLR), due to overhead restrictions and device constraints. If a malicious actor were to get hold of this firmware, reverse engineer it and craft a ROP attack for a device and the firmware, all similar devices would immediately become vulnerable to this attack. Moreover, it has been shown that compared to general purpose devices, IoT and embedded devices are far slower to receive the patch for vulnerabilities, leaving many of them still vulnerable up to multiple months even after a patch has been pushed out. In this paper, we present a tool to generate logically diverse, but functionally equivalent firmware for resource constrained embedded devices. Our system is context aware and prevents the uncertain performance or large overheads usually associated with diversifying software due to addition of extra instructions. Our security analysis shows that by diversifying firmware, we are able to generate variants that are secure against generalized attacks that involve using ROP gadgets.
title_zh: 资源受限嵌入式系统中的软件多样性
abstract_zh: 资源受限的嵌入式设备通常由于开销限制和硬件约束，缺乏针对返回导向编程（ROP）攻击的安全防护措施，例如地址空间布局随机化（ASLR）。如果攻击者获取了固件，对其进行逆向工程并为该设备及固件构造出ROP攻击，则所有类似的设备将立即面临此攻击的威胁。此外，研究表明，与通用设备相比，物联网（IoT）和嵌入式设备接收漏洞补丁的速度要慢得多，导致即使补丁已经发布，仍有大量设备在数月内仍处于易受攻击状态。本文提出了一种工具，用于为资源受限的嵌入式设备生成逻辑上多样化但功能等效的固件。我们的系统具备上下文感知能力，避免了因添加额外指令进行软件多样化而通常带来的性能不确定性或较大开销。安全分析表明，通过对固件进行多样化处理，我们能够生成可抵御涉及使用ROP小工具的通用化攻击的安全变体。

title: Enhancing Fault Tolerance in Microblaze V Soft-Core Processors: Performance and Reliability Assessment with ESA Benchmark Applications
authors: Gabriel Camargo, Fabio Benevenuti, José Rodrigo Azambuja, Antonio Carlos Beck, Fernanda Kastensmidt
abstract: RISC-V processors are increasingly considered for space applications due to their open-source nature, configurability, and suitability for implementing custom fault-tolerant designs. To better characterize their behavior in space-relevant scenarios, this paper evaluates both the performance and reliability of multiple MicroBlaze V soft-core configurations using the European Space Agency's OnBoard Processing Benchmark (OBPMark) applications. A selected subset of configurations was additionally hardened using the Xilinx Triple Modular Redundancy (TMR) IP to assess the effectiveness of architectural redundancy in mitigating faults in SRAM-based FPGAs. All OBPMark applications were adapted to run in bare-metal mode, with results collected via serial telemetry. For reliability assessment, the workload of each application was adjusted so that each execution cycle lasted approximately <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathbf{1 0 0 ~ m s}$</tex>. Faults were then injected into the configuration memory through the ICAP interface, with no more than one fault injected per execution cycle. The combined performance and fault-injection results highlight the trade-offs between execution speed, FPGA resource usage, and robustness, offering guidance for designing RISC-V soft-core processors for space-grade FPGA platforms.
title_zh: Microblaze V 软核处理器中容错能力的增强：基于 ESA 基准应用程序的性能与可靠性评估
abstract_zh: 由于RISC-V处理器具有开源性、可配置性以及适合实现定制容错设计的特点，其在航天应用中正受到越来越多的关注。为了更好地表征其在空间相关场景下的行为，本文利用欧洲航天局的星载处理基准（OBPMark）应用程序，评估了多种MicroBlaze V软核配置的性能与可靠性。部分选定的配置还采用了赛灵思（Xilinx）三重模块冗余（TMR）IP进行加固，以评估架构级冗余在缓解基于SRAM的FPGA故障方面的有效性。所有OBPMark应用程序均被修改为在裸机模式下运行，并通过串行遥测收集结果。在可靠性评估中，调整了每个应用程序的工作负载，使每次执行周期持续约100毫秒。然后通过ICAP接口向配置内存注入故障，且每个执行周期内最多注入一个故障。综合性能与故障注入测试结果揭示了执行速度、FPGA资源占用和鲁棒性之间的权衡关系，为空间级FPGA平台上RISC-V软核处理器的设计提供了指导。

title: Lightweight TinyML NIDS For IoT Devices
authors: Mohd Yusoff, Siti Sarah, Md Rafiqul Islam, Mohamed Hadi Habaebi, Athaurahman Najeeb
publish: 2025 10th International Conference on Computer and Communication Engineering (ICCCE)
abstract: With the increase in the implementation of Internet of Things (IoT) devices, this has introduced some serious and critical security challenges, specifically with regards to the resource-constrained environments, which are IoT devices that are used by the public for convenience. Furthermore, traditional intrusion detection systems (IDS) are too computationally intensive for such devices, emphasizing on the need for a much lightweight and efficient alternatives. This paper focuses on developing a lightweight IDS using TinyML to tackle these security challenges and ensure safety in IoT devices. Public IoT datasets were preprocessed to enhance the quality of datasets, and it is followed by feature importance and class distribution analyses. The machine learning models, K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN), Decision Tree, and Logistic Regression, were trained for intrusion detection. The models were then converted to C++ code format for deployment on a Raspberry Pi simulation. Testing and evaluation were conducted using opensource Quick Emulator (QEMU), which uses dynamic binary translation to emulate a computer's processor. QEMU provides a variety of hardware and device models for virtual machines, enabling it to run different guest operating systems, making it an ideal option. The testing and evaluation processes were conducted to assess performance using metrics like accuracy, precision, recall, and resource utilization. The results demonstrate that the proposed system achieves high detection accuracy with minimal computational overhead, making it a viable solution for securing resource-constrained IoT devices. This study underscores the potential of TinyML in improving and enhancing IoT security while ensuring scalability as well as efficiency.
title_zh: 面向物联网设备的轻量级微型机器学习网络入侵检测系统
abstract_zh: 随着物联网（IoT）设备的广泛应用，带来了一些严重且关键的安全挑战，尤其是在资源受限的环境中——这些环境中的物联网设备通常为公众提供便利而被广泛使用。此外，传统的入侵检测系统（IDS）对于此类设备而言计算开销过大，凸显了对更轻量、更高效替代方案的迫切需求。本文聚焦于利用TinyML开发一种轻量级入侵检测系统，以应对这些安全挑战，保障物联网设备的安全。研究中对公开的物联网数据集进行了预处理，以提升数据集质量，并进一步开展了特征重要性分析和类别分布分析。随后，训练了K近邻（KNN）、决策树和逻辑回归等机器学习模型用于入侵检测。这些模型被转换为C++代码格式，以便在Raspberry Pi模拟环境中部署。测试与评估通过开源的快速模拟器（QEMU）进行，该模拟器采用动态二进制翻译技术来模拟计算机处理器。QEMU支持多种硬件和设备模型，可用于虚拟机运行不同的客户操作系统，因此成为理想的测试平台。通过准确率、精确率、召回率以及资源占用等指标对系统性能进行了全面评估。实验结果表明，所提出的系统在极低计算开销下实现了高检测准确率，为保护资源受限的物联网设备提供了一种可行的解决方案。本研究突显了TinyML在提升物联网安全方面的重要潜力，同时兼顾了系统的可扩展性和高效性。

title: Case Study: The High-Level Synthesis-Based Firmware Upgrade for the Digital Trigger Back-End System of the ATLAS Liquid Argon Calorimeter
authors: Melissa S. Aguiar, Dabson F. dos Santos, Adriana Milic, Diogo A. Cardinot, Marcos V. S. Oliveira, Luciano M. A. Filho, Gustavo B. Libotte, Bernardo S. Peralva
abstract: The trigger and data acquisition systems of the LHC experiments rely on reconfigurable architectures based on FPGA (Field Programmable Gate Arrays) to accommodate design updates and increasing of the detectors complexity. However, this flexibility comes at the cost of longer development and validation cycles, particularly for large real-time systems operating under strict latency and throughput constraints. This work presents the HLS-based firmware redesign of the back-end system from the ATLAS Liquid Argon Calorimeter, where the introduction of a parallel switch matrix on REMAP block significantly simplifies the architecture and reduces the use of firmware resources. The proposed methodology allows systematic design exploration without modifying the source code, shortens verification time, and provides a more efficient workflow for creating and maintaining large-scale FPGA firmware in modern trigger systems.
title_zh: 案例研究：基于高级综合技术的ATLAS液氩量热计数字触发后端系统固件升级
abstract_zh: LHC实验的触发器和数据采集系统依赖于基于FPGA（现场可编程门阵列）的可重构架构，以适应设计更新以及探测器复杂性的增加。然而，这种灵活性的代价是更长的设计开发与验证周期，特别是对于在严格延迟和吞吐量限制下运行的大型实时系统而言。本文介绍了基于高级综合（HLS）技术对ATLAS液氩量能器后端系统的固件进行重新设计的工作，其中在REMAP模块中引入并行交换矩阵，显著简化了系统架构并减少了固件资源的占用。所提出的方法能够在不修改源代码的前提下实现系统化的设计探索，缩短验证时间，并为现代触发系统中大规模FPGA固件的开发与维护提供了更高效的工作流程。

title: 2026 IEEE 27th Latin American Test Symposium (LATS)

title: A Latin American Institution&#x2019;s Journey in Digital Systems Education: From Breadboards to FPGA and RISC-V Design_supp1-3684367.pdf
authors: Sergio Abreo
abstract: This paper presents the evolution of digital systems education at the Universidad Industrial de Santander, beginning with hands-on projects using discrete logic chips on breadboards. The curriculum progressively adopted hardware description languages (VHDL and Verilog) and eventually integrated RISC-V open hardware through the RVfpga project. This transformation has positioned the university as a regional reference in Latin America and contributed to the professional success of its graduates in the global semiconductor industry. The paper describes key milestones, methodological decisions, and pedagogical strategies that enabled this shift, analyzes its impact on student engagement and learning outcomes, and offers recommendations for institutions seeking to modernize their digital systems curricula. The experience illustrates how sustained curricular innovation and project-based learning can foster academic excellence and real-world impact in electronics and computer engineering.
title_zh: 一个拉丁美洲机构在数字系统教育中的历程：从面包板到FPGA与RISC-V设计_supp1-3684367.pdf
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了桑坦德工业大学数字系统教育的发展历程，该历程始于在面包板上使用分立逻辑芯片进行动手实践项目。课程体系逐步引入硬件描述语言（VHDL和Verilog），最终通过RVfpga项目整合了RISC-V开源硬件。这一转变使该校成为拉丁美洲地区的标杆院校，并助力其毕业生在全球半导体行业中取得职业成功。论文阐述了推动这一变革的关键里程碑、方法论决策和教学策略，分析了其对学生参与度和学习成果的影响，并为希望现代化数字系统课程的院校提供了建议。该实践经验表明，持续的课程创新与基于项目的教学模式能够促进电子与计算机工程领域的学术卓越和实际影响力。

title: Soft Error Mitigation in a Real-Time Control System Through Hardware Protection on an SRAM-Based FPGA
authors: A. Giuffra, J. Minaya, J. Tarrillo
abstract: Robotics and automation systems requires a design to handle transient faults that can lead to financial loss, physical damage, or equipment failure. Non-ionizing radiation is a common source of such faults in transistor-based devices. SRAMbased FPGAs provide flexibility for embedded designs using soft processors. This work presents a real-time temperature control system implemented on a MicroBlaze soft-core processor within a Xilinx Artix-7 XC7A100T FPGA, deployed on the Nexys A7100T board. Robustness against Single Event Upsets (SEUs) is evaluated through fault injection on three PI controller implementations: software-based, hardware IP core, and a triplicated TMR design. FreeRTOS manages scheduling, data acquisition, and control signal generation. MATLAB simulations serve as a baseline to validate and compare performance and reliability across the three approaches.
title_zh: 基于SRAM的FPGA上通过硬件保护实现实时控制系统中的软错误缓解
abstract_zh: 机器人和自动化系统需要具备应对瞬态故障的设计能力，以避免造成经济损失、物理损坏或设备故障。非电离辐射是晶体管器件中此类故障的常见来源。基于SRAM的现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）通过使用软核处理器为嵌入式设计提供了灵活性。本文提出了一种在Xilinx Artix-7 XC7A100T FPGA内的MicroBlaze软核处理器上实现的实时温度控制系统，并部署于Nexys A7-100T开发板上。研究通过在三种比例积分（PI）控制器实现方案——纯软件实现、硬件IP核实现以及三重模块冗余（TMR）设计——上进行故障注入，评估其对单粒子翻转（SEU）的鲁棒性。系统采用FreeRTOS进行任务调度、数据采集和控制信号生成。同时，利用MATLAB仿真作为基准，对这三种方案的性能与可靠性进行验证和比较。

title: Emulating SDC-1 Hardware Faults Through Application Level Bit-Flip Injections in QNNs
authors: Giacomo Perlo, Antonio Porsia, Annachiara Ruospo, Ernesto Sanchez
abstract: Nowadays, quantized Neural Networks (QNNs) are increasingly deployed in safety-critical scenarios based on resource-constrained edge devices, making resilience evaluation of paramount importance. Current studies investigate transient or permanent faults in a separate way leaving a gap between hardware- and application-level fault analysis. This paper deals with this gap by presenting a novel fault-correlation methodology that analyses the QNN behavior under transient bit-flips and permanent stuck-at faults. The proposed approach experimentally demonstrates that the impact of permanent hardware faults, which are known to be computationally costly, can be effectively estimated through extremely fast application-level fault injections. The experimental results have been gathered in three image-classification QNNs (MobileNetV1, EfficientNetB0, and ResNet18) deployed in a RISC-V based SoC, and show an average cross-correlation of 87.05% in the three experiments between the two fault models under evaluation.
title_zh: 通过在量子神经网络中进行应用级比特翻转注入来模拟SDC-1硬件故障
abstract_zh: 如今，量化神经网络（QNN）越来越多地部署在资源受限的边缘设备上的安全关键场景中，因此对其鲁棒性进行评估变得至关重要。目前的研究通常分别考察瞬态故障或永久性故障，导致硬件层面与应用层面的故障分析之间存在脱节。本文提出了一种新颖的故障关联方法，旨在弥合这一差距，该方法可同时分析QNN在瞬态位翻转和永久性固定故障下的行为表现。所提出的方法通过实验表明，对于已知计算开销较大的永久性硬件故障，其影响可以通过极快速的应用级故障注入进行有效估计。实验结果基于部署在RISC-V架构SoC上的三个图像分类QNN模型（MobileNetV1、EfficientNetB0和ResNet18）获得，三个实验中两种故障模型之间的平均交叉相关性达到87.05%。

title: M-EL2N: Data-Efficient Fault Injection Through Sample Difficulty Analysis
authors: Nicolò Bellarmino, Alberto Bosio, Ahmed Al-Kaf, Mounir Benabdenbi, Régis Leveugle, Riccardo Cantoro
abstract: Fault Injection (FI) is the standard technique for assessing the resilience of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), but campaign time scales with the number of input stimuli applied per injected fault. Prior work has shown that selecting challenging inputs based on confidence metrics can significantly reduce this workload. In this paper, we propose Mirrored EL2N (M-EL2N), a novel sample-ranking metric that symmetrizes the original EL2N score by re-scaling the contribution of misclassified samples. This yields a unified notion of sample difficulty that prioritizes highly informative inputs regardless of prediction correctness, enabling faster exposure of critical faults, and requires no architectural knowledge. We evaluate Mirrored EL2N against established metrics (Cross-Entropy, DeepGini, EL2N) across multiple CNN architectures and datasets under a single-bit fault model in network weights, and we present initial results on a post-training quantized CNN. Experimental results show that Mirrored EL2N consistently achieves earlier detection of critical faults with up to three orders of magnitude reduction in the number of test samples required to reach 99% of the detected critical faults, while maintaining near-perfect detection curves (<tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathbf{A U C} \approx 1$</tex>). These results establish Mirrored EL2N as a practical and lightweight tool for data-efficient FI workload reduction in both floating-point and quantized CNNs.
title_zh: M-EL2N：通过样本难度分析实现数据高效的故障注入
abstract_zh: 故障注入（FI）是评估卷积神经网络（CNN）鲁棒性的标准技术，但其测试周期与每个注入故障所应用的输入刺激数量成正比。先前的研究表明，基于置信度指标选择具有挑战性的输入样本可显著降低工作负载。本文提出了一种新的样本排序指标——镜像EL2N（Mirrored EL2N, M-EL2N），该方法通过对误分类样本的贡献进行重新缩放，对原始EL2N得分进行对称化处理。这产生了一个统一的样本难度度量，能够优先选择信息量高的输入样本，而不论其预测是否正确，从而更快地暴露关键故障，且无需任何网络结构知识。我们在多个CNN架构和数据集上，针对网络权重中的单比特故障模型，将Mirrored EL2N与现有指标（交叉熵、DeepGini、EL2N）进行了对比评估，并给出了在训练后量化CNN上的初步结果。实验结果表明，Mirrored EL2N能够更早地检测到关键故障，在达到99%已检测关键故障率时，所需测试样本数量最多可减少三个数量级，同时保持近乎完美的检测曲线（AUC ≈ 1）。这些结果表明，Mirrored EL2N是一种实用且轻量化的工具，可用于在浮点型和量化型CNN中高效减少故障注入的工作负载。

title: LOOL: Low-Overhead, Optimization-Log-Guided Compiler Fuzzing
authors: Felix Berlakovich, Florian Schwarcz, Gergö Barany, Hanspeter Mössenböck, Stefan Brunthaler
publish: ACM Transactions on Software Engineering and Methodology

title: Susceptibility Evaluation of Layout-Based 2:1 Multiplexer Topologies
authors: Ana Flávia D. Reis, Eduardo A. C. da Costa, Rafael B. Schvittz
abstract: Technology scaling has improved performance but also increased the susceptibility of integrated circuits to radiation-induced faults, such as Single Event Transients (SETs). Since physical layout influences SET generation and propagation, layout-level analysis is essential. This work evaluated the susceptibility to single-event transients, including area, robustness, power consumption, and performance of seven 2:1 multiplexer topologies. It also compares the proposed designs and a traditional design in a standard cell library. The evaluation is based on both physical layout characteristics and electrical simulations, utilizing the IHP 130 nm open-source PDK. Results show key trade-offs in selecting a multiplexer topology, since no topology proved superior in all aspects simultaneously. The proposed methodology enables a more accurate assessment of radiation susceptibility, overcoming the limitations of purely transistor-level approaches.
title_zh: 基于布局的2:1多路复用器拓扑结构的敏感性评估
abstract_zh: 工艺微缩提升了性能，但也增加了集成电路对辐射诱发故障（如单粒子瞬态，SET）的敏感性。由于物理布局会影响SET的产生与传播，因此布局级分析至关重要。本文评估了七种2:1多路复用器拓扑结构在单粒子瞬态敏感性方面的表现，包括面积、鲁棒性、功耗和性能，并将所提出的方案与标准单元库中的传统设计进行了比较。评估基于物理布局特征和电路级电学仿真，采用IHP 130 nm开源PDK实现。结果表明，在选择多路复用器拓扑时存在关键的权衡关系，因为没有任何一种拓扑在所有方面均同时表现出优越性。本文提出的方法能够更准确地评估辐射敏感性，克服了仅在晶体管级分析方法的局限性。

title: Reliability Assessment of Deep Neural Networks and Accelerators Across Design Stages
authors: Mohammad Hasan Ahmadilivani, Natalia Cherezova, Michael Glaß, Juan-David Guerrero-Balaguera, Maksim Jenihhin, Angeliki Kritikakou, Robert Limas Sierra, Leticia Bolzani Poelhs, Jaan Raik, Lucas Roquet, Fernando Fernandes dos Santos, Felipe Augusto da Silva, Matteo Sonza Reorda, Alessandro Veronesi, Ernesto Cristopher Villegas Castillo, Josie E. Rodriguez Condia
abstract: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is driving the introduction of advanced functionality and autonomy across several domains, including automotive, robotics, health care, and aerospace. Such advances are supported by the availability of algorithms and hardware accelerator platforms to efficiently implement them. However, transistor miniaturization raises reliability concerns during in-field operation and poses challenges in terms of computational intensity and performance for which conventional design and fault-characterization strategies are not well-suited. This work reviews three approaches for determining fault vulnerabilities and reliability challenges in hardware accelerators, devices, and software for Deep Neural Networks. The first strategy describes a cost-effective semi-analytical reliability assessment method for the design space exploration of reliability-performance trade-offs using reconfigurable systolic array engines. The second strategy analyzes and evaluates four abstraction levels for dot-product-unit-based accelerators and assesses the implications of selecting an affordable strategy based on the analysis needs. The third approach analyzes the critical role of correctly selecting representative inputs in large Vision Transformers (ViTs) for their effective reliability evaluation.
title_zh: 跨设计阶段的深度神经网络与加速器可靠性评估
abstract_zh: 人工智能（AI）正在推动汽车、机器人、医疗保健和航空航天等多个领域先进功能和自主性的引入。这些进步得益于算法和硬件加速平台的可用性，从而得以高效实现。然而，晶体管不断微缩导致现场运行期间出现可靠性问题，并在计算强度和性能方面带来挑战，传统的设计和故障表征策略难以应对这些问题。本文综述了三种用于确定深度神经网络硬件加速器、器件及软件中故障脆弱性和可靠性挑战的方法。第一种策略提出了一种经济高效的半解析式可靠性评估方法，用于探索基于可重构脉动阵列引擎的可靠性与性能之间的权衡设计空间。第二种策略分析并评估了基于点积单元的加速器的四个抽象层次，并根据分析需求探讨了选择成本较低策略的影响。第三种方法则分析了在大型视觉Transformer（ViTs）中正确选择代表性输入对其有效进行可靠性评估的关键作用。

title: Evaluating an Analog Test Pattern Generation Tool by Means of Hardware-Emulated Fault Injection
authors: Luis A. Duarte, Lucas B. Zilch, Állan F. G. Ferreira, Marcelo S. Lubaszewski, Tiago R. Balen
abstract: This work presents a hardware-emulated fault injection experiment designed to evaluate a previously proposed test pattern generation tool for analog circuits. The tool processes the SPICE netlist of the circuit under test, performing iterative fault simulations and analyzing AC, DC, and transient responses at internal nodes and primary outputs. Its output is a test sequence that identifies optimal stimuli and observation points to maximize fault coverage. For experimental validation, a simple operational amplifier was implemented using MOS transistors from a commercial device. The SPICE netlist and corresponding transistor models were provided as input to the tool. The generated test sequence was then applied to the hardware circuit while open and short faults were injected directly into the hardware, considering the same fault model which was previously simulated. Experimental results show good fault coverage and good agreement with the simulations. Discrepancies were observed in the behavior of certain hard-to-detect faults — particularly open faults at transistor gate terminals — between the simulation and the hardware implementation.
title_zh: 通过硬件仿真故障注入评估模拟测试图形生成工具
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一项基于硬件仿真故障注入的实验，旨在评估一种先前提出的模拟电路测试图形生成工具。该工具处理被测电路的SPICE网表，通过迭代进行故障仿真，并分析内部节点和主输出端的交流（AC）、直流（DC）和瞬态响应。其输出为一个测试序列，用于确定最优激励信号和观测点，以实现最大故障覆盖率。为进行实验验证，采用商用器件中的MOS晶体管实现了一个简单的运算放大器。将该电路的SPICE网表及相应的晶体管模型作为输入提供给该工具。随后，将生成的测试序列应用于实际硬件电路，同时在硬件中直接注入开路和短路故障，所采用的故障模型与前期仿真中使用的模型一致。实验结果表明，该工具具有较高的故障覆盖率，且与仿真结果吻合良好。然而，在某些难以检测的故障（特别是晶体管栅极端子的开路故障）行为上，仿真与硬件实现之间存在差异。

title: Characterization of a Fault-Tolerant RISC-V SoC in an SRAM-based FPGA Under Proton Irradiation
authors: Wesley Grignani, Douglas A. Santos, Carolina Imianosky, Douglas R. Melo, Frédéric Wrobel, Luigi Dilillo
abstract: Radiation-induced faults pose significant challenges for safety-critical systems operating in harsh environments such as space and avionics. Among these effects, Single-Event Upsets (SEUs) can affect both logic and configuration memories in SRAM-based FPGAs, potentially compromising system functionality and reliability. The Hardened RISC-V System-on-Chip (HARV-SoC) incorporates a fault-tolerant soft-core processor designed with in-circuit hardening techniques such as Triple Modular Redundancy (TMR) and Hamming Error-Correcting Code (ECC), combined with structured fault-observability mechanisms to enhance system resilience under radiation. This work presents a characterization of proton irradiation for the HARV-SoC implemented on an Xilinx Artix-7 FPGA, aiming to investigate the susceptibility of both the processor architecture and the FPGA configuration memory to radiation-induced faults. The experiments were conducted using proton beams at different energies to assess the impact of radiation on functional correctness and recovery behavior, thereby providing insights into the reliability of SRAM-based FPGA platforms for space-grade and mission-critical applications.
title_zh: 在质子辐照下基于SRAM的FPGA中容错RISC-V片上系统表征
abstract_zh: 辐射引起的故障对在空间和航空电子等恶劣环境中运行的安全关键系统构成了重大挑战。其中，单粒子翻转（SEU）可能影响基于SRAM的FPGA中的逻辑单元和配置存储器，从而潜在地损害系统的功能性和可靠性。硬化的RISC-V片上系统（HARV-SoC）集成了一个具备容错能力的软核处理器，采用电路内加固技术设计，例如三模冗余（TMR）和海明纠错码（ECC），并结合结构化的故障可观测机制，以增强系统在辐射环境下的弹性。本文针对在Xilinx Artix-7 FPGA上实现的HARV-SoC开展了质子辐照特性表征研究，旨在探究处理器架构和FPGA配置存储器对辐射诱发故障的敏感性。实验使用不同能量的质子束进行，以评估辐射对功能正确性和恢复行为的影响，从而为基于SRAM的FPGA平台在航天级和任务关键型应用中的可靠性提供深入见解。

title: Towards Reliable and Scalable Firmware Testing in Communication-Constrained Environments
authors: J. D. S. Coutinho Filho, A. H. P. Dantas, T. D. de Araújo, J. E. Silva Filho, J. A. N. da Silveira, A. A. M. de Albuquerque
abstract: The rapid evolution of the Internet of Things (IoT) has driven the widespread adoption of Low Power Wide Area Network (LPWAN) technologies in embedded devices for diverse applications. While LPWANs provide long-range connectivity and high energy efficiency, they inherently suffer from high latency, low data rates, and dependence on external infrastructure. These constraints impose severe limitations on firmware test automation, leading to slow and costly validation processes that often fail to meet stringent reliability and security requirements. This paper presents an alternative method for automating integration and vulnerability testing in embedded firmware using a SEGGER J-Link debug probe with Real-Time Transfer (RTT) technology combined with the Pytest framework. The proposed architecture enables testing independent of network infrastructure, supporting functional, regression, and controlled fuzzing experiments that assess system robustness under unexpected states. When applied to a real IoT device, three consecutive automated test cycles demonstrated a reduction in total execution time from 272,471 seconds (LPWAN + Pytest) to 25,473 seconds (RTT + Pytest) — an absolute gain of 246,998 seconds, equivalent to a 90.6 % improvement in performance. This significant efficiency gain enhances reproducibility, shortens regression cycles, and facilitates seamless integration with DevOps pipelines. The proposed methodology addresses a gap identified in the literature — the lack of accessible, automated, and reproducible solutions for firmware integration testing in communication-constrained environments — thus contributing to the advancement of reliable embedded software design by reconciling hardware limitations with modern quality and automation requirements.
title_zh: 面向通信受限环境中可靠且可扩展的固件测试
abstract_zh: 物联网（IoT）的快速发展推动了低功耗广域网（LPWAN）技术在各类嵌入式设备中的广泛应用。尽管LPWAN具备远距离连接和高能效的优势，但其固有的高延迟、低数据速率以及对外部基础设施的依赖性，给固件测试自动化带来了严峻挑战，导致验证过程缓慢且成本高昂，常常难以满足严格的可靠性和安全性要求。本文提出了一种替代方法，利用SEGGER J-Link调试探针结合实时传输（RTT）技术与Pytest测试框架，实现嵌入式固件的集成测试与漏洞检测自动化。所提出的架构摆脱了对网络基础设施的依赖，支持功能测试、回归测试以及可控的模糊测试，能够在异常状态下评估系统的鲁棒性。在真实物联网设备上的应用结果表明，连续三次自动化测试周期的总执行时间从272,471秒（基于LPWAN + Pytest）减少至25,473秒（基于RTT + Pytest），绝对节省时间达246,998秒，性能提升高达90.6%。这一显著的效率提升增强了测试的可重复性，缩短了回归测试周期，并便于与DevOps流水线无缝集成。本研究提出的方法填补了现有文献中的一项空白——即在通信受限环境中缺乏可访问、自动化且可复现的固件集成测试解决方案，从而通过协调硬件限制与现代质量及自动化需求，推动了高可靠性嵌入式软件设计的发展。

title: Deep Learning-Based Power Side-Channel Evaluation from RTL Switching-Activity Proxies
authors: Behnam Farnaghinejad, Annachiara Ruospo, Alessandro Savino, Stefano Di Carlo, Ernesto Sanchez
abstract: Deep learning has become a central tool in power side-channel analysis, supporting not only key recovery from measured traces but also the detection of key-dependent patterns, templates, and leakage structure. Despite this progress, the use of deep learning for leakage assessment at the Register-Transfer Level (RTL) remains largely unexamined. RTL-level switching activity provides the earliest point in the design flow where power side-channel leakage can be assessed, offering fast analysis while avoiding the complexity and cost associated with gate-level evaluation. This paper presents the first study that applies both unsupervised and supervised deep learning to power side-channel evaluation at RTL-level. An unsupervised Convolutional Long Short-Term Memory (ConvLSTM) autoencoder is used to learn temporal representations without key labels, and a supervised Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) is included to provide a profiling-style reference. Both models are evaluated using 40,000 RTL switching-activity proxies generated with VeriSide for AES-128 executions on a CVA6 core with an AES-64 accelerator. The unsupervised model achieves precise key distinguishability and consistent leakage localization, approaching the supervised baseline with moderately higher trace requirements. The results show that deep learning can expose exploitable leakage directly at the RTL stage, motivating the integration of mitigation strategies early in the digital design process.
title_zh: 基于深度学习的RTL级开关活动代理功率侧信道评估
abstract_zh: 深度学习已成为功耗侧信道分析中的核心工具，不仅支持从测量的迹中恢复密钥，还能检测与密钥相关的模式、模板和泄漏结构。尽管取得了这些进展，深度学习在寄存器传输级（RTL）进行泄漏评估的应用仍基本未被深入研究。RTL级的开关活动为设计流程中最早可评估功耗侧信道泄漏的阶段，能够在避免门级评估复杂性和成本的同时实现快速分析。本文首次研究了将无监督和有监督深度学习方法应用于RTL级功耗侧信道评估的效果。研究采用一种无监督的卷积长短期记忆（ConvLSTM）自编码器，在无需密钥标签的情况下学习时间特征表示，并引入一种有监督的卷积神经网络（CNN）作为基于轮廓分析的参考基准。两种模型均使用VeriSide生成的40,000个针对CVA6核心搭载AES-64加速器执行AES-128操作所产生的RTL级开关活动代理数据进行评估。实验结果表明，无监督模型能够精确区分密钥并稳定定位泄漏位置，其性能接近有监督基线模型，仅需适度增加迹数量。研究结果证明，深度学习可直接在RTL阶段揭示可被利用的泄漏，从而推动在数字设计早期阶段即集成防护措施。

title: A Survey of Trust Chain in Secure Embedded Systems: From Secure Boot to TEE Applications
authors: Hyunmin Kim
abstract: The proliferation of connected embedded systems across critical infrastructure, automotive, medical, and industrial domains has made trust chain architecture a fundamental design requirement. A trust chain establishes cryptographically verifiable integrity from an immutable hardware root of trust through boot stages to runtime execution, ensuring only authenticated software operates on the platform. This survey presents a comprehensive analysis of trust chain architectures for secure embedded systems, synthesizing nearly 100 publications spanning 2004–2025. We propose a hierarchical taxonomy across five dimensions: Hardware Root of Trust mechanisms (TPM 2.0, ARM TrustZone, Intel SGX/TDX, AMD SEV-SNP, ARM CCA, RISC-V PMP); Secure Boot Chain implementations (verified, measured, and authenticated boot); Trusted Execution Environment architectures (OP-TEE, commercial TEEs, confidential computing, RISC-V solutions); TEE applications (secure storage, cryptographic services, confidential AI, biometrics, payments); and Remote Attestation protocols (TPM-based, lightweight IoT, zero-knowledge, post-quantum variants). Through comparative evaluation of 45+ implementations across 15 platforms, we assess solutions based on security guarantees, performance overhead, memory footprint, and certification status. Published benchmarks indicate TEE context switching overhead ranges from approximately 0.4μs (seL4 IPC) to 85μs (full TA invocation), secure boot adds approximately 57ms–600ms to boot time depending on platform, and trust chain components require 32–512KB additional flash memory. We provide critical analysis of 2024–2025 vulnerabilities affecting UEFI Secure Boot (CVE-2024-7344, CVE-2025-3052), AMD SEV-SNP (RMPocalypse), and Intel TDX, demonstrating ongoing security challenges in production systems. We identify critical research gaps: absence of end-to-end formal verification; persistent TEE interface vulnerabilities; attestation scalability limitations; insufficient side-channel protections in VM-level confidential computing; and urgent post-quantum migration needs following NIST’s 2024–2025 standardization. Seven priority research directions are proposed, including compositional verification frameworks, side-channel resistant TEE design, scalable swarm attestation, zero-knowledge attestation verification, and quantum-resistant trust establishment with emerging PQC hardware support.
title_zh: 安全嵌入式系统中信任链的综述：从安全启动到可信执行环境应用
abstract_zh:
随着互联嵌入式系统在关键基础设施、汽车、医疗和工业领域的广泛普及，信任链架构已成为一项基本的设计需求。信任链通过从不可变的硬件信任根开始，经过各启动阶段直至运行时执行，建立可密码学验证的完整性保障，确保只有经过认证的软件才能在平台上运行。本文对面向安全嵌入式系统的信任链架构进行了全面综述，综合分析了2004年至2025年间近100篇相关文献。我们提出了一个涵盖五个维度的分层分类体系：硬件信任根机制（TPM 2.0、ARM TrustZone、Intel SGX/TDX、AMD SEV-SNP、ARM CCA、RISC-V PMP）；安全启动链实现方式（验证式、度量式和认证式启动）；可信执行环境架构（OP-TEE、商用TEE、机密计算、RISC-V解决方案）；TEE应用（安全存储、加密服务、机密AI、生物识别、支付）；以及远程证明协议（基于TPM的、轻量级IoT、零知识、抗量子变体）。通过对15个平台上的45种以上实现方案进行比较评估，我们从安全性保障、性能开销、内存占用和认证状态等方面进行了系统分析。已发表的基准测试表明，TEE上下文切换开销约为0.4μs（seL4 IPC）至85μs（完整TA调用），安全启动会使启动时间增加约57ms至600ms，具体取决于平台，而信任链组件通常需要额外32–512KB的闪存空间。

本文还对2024–2025年影响实际系统的多个重大漏洞进行了深入分析，包括UEFI安全启动（CVE-2024-7344、CVE-2025-3052）、AMD SEV-SNP（RMPocalypse）和Intel TDX中的漏洞，揭示了当前生产系统中持续存在的安全挑战。我们识别出若干关键研究空白：端到端形式化验证的缺失；TEE接口长期存在的安全漏洞；远程证明的可扩展性不足；虚拟机级机密计算中侧信道防护薄弱；以及在NIST于2024–2025年完成后量子密码标准化背景下紧迫的抗量子迁移需求。

最后，本文提出七个优先研究方向：组合式验证框架、抗侧信道攻击的TEE设计、可扩展的群体证明机制、零知识证明验证技术，以及结合新兴PQC硬件支持的抗量子信任建立机制。

title: Fault-Tolerance in FINN-Based CNN Accelerator for In-Orbit Land Cover Classification
authors: Fabio Benevenuti, Ulisses Maffazioli, Arthur F. Ely, Eduardo Marañon, Antonio Carlos S. Beck, José Rodrigo Azambuja, Fernanda L. Kastensmidt
abstract: SRAM-based FPGAs fabricated in commercial-grade FinFET or bulk planar CMOS technology are susceptible to radiation-induced faults, which poses challenges for their use in space applications. This work presents a reliability analysis of two convolutional neural network (CNN) topologies designed for land cover classification in Earth observation and remote sensing, targeting their use for in-orbit computing. The neural networks are implemented on the FPGA using the FINN framework. To assess reliability under radiation-induced faults, we perform emulated fault injection in the FPGA configuration memory and evaluate its impact on neural network inference. We further examine the benefits of selectively applying Triple Modular Redundancy (TMR) to critical CNN blocks, while leveraging the inherent resilience of CNNs to minor computational errors in other blocks. Radiation testing with alpha particles in vacuum was performed to validate the emulated fault injection results. Selective TMR improved mean fluence to failure (<tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$M \Phi \mathbf{T F}$</tex>) by up to <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$2 \times$</tex>, achieving the same reliability level as full TMR but with only a <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$1.5 \times$</tex> increase in FPGA resource utilization, compared to <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$2.6 \times$</tex> for full TMR.
title_zh: 基于FINN的CNN加速器在轨土地覆盖分类中的容错性
abstract_zh: 采用商用FinFET或体硅平面CMOS工艺制造的基于SRAM的现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）容易受到辐射引起的故障影响，这对其在航天应用中的使用构成了挑战。本文针对用于地球观测与遥感中地表覆盖分类的两种卷积神经网络（CNN）拓扑结构，开展了可靠性分析，旨在支持其在轨计算的应用。这些神经网络通过FINN框架在FPGA上实现。为了评估辐射诱发故障下的可靠性，我们对FPGA的配置存储器进行了模拟故障注入，并分析了其对神经网络推理性能的影响。进一步地，我们研究了对CNN中关键模块选择性地应用三模冗余（TMR）的优势，同时利用CNN其他模块对轻微计算错误所具有的内在容错能力。为验证模拟故障注入的结果，还开展了真空环境下的α粒子辐射测试。实验结果表明，选择性TMR将平均失效注量（$M \Phi \mathbf{T F}$）提高了最高达$2 \times$，达到了与全TMR相当的可靠性水平，但FPGA资源占用仅增加$1.5 \times$，而全TMR方案的资源占用则增加了$2.6 \times$。

title: Validating Statistical Delay Test Generation Under Timing Variations via SAT-Based ATPG
authors: Hanieh Jafarzadeh, Jan Dennis Reimer, Hussam Amrouch, Sybille Hellebrand, Hans-Joachim Wunderlich
abstract: Process, voltage and temperature fluctuations induce timing variations which require statistical test generation methods for detecting Small Delay Faults (SDFs). Such a test set is called robust, if for each fault f of a randomly created circuit instance, it contains a pattern detecting <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$f$</tex> with its minimum theoretically detectable size. The paper at hand combines statistical delay test generation and deterministic satisfability-based test generation to validate the robustness of the test sets. The computing time for the SAT-based algorithm is drastically reduced as only the small set of faults is targeted not detected by the statistical approach. It is seen that the statistically generated test set has already an extremely high quality and only very few patterns need to be added by the SAT-based algorithm. Test set compaction starting with these deterministic patterns, provides an additional reduction of test data volumes while keeping the improved fault efficiency.
title_zh: 基于SAT的ATPG验证时序变化下的统计延迟测试生成
abstract_zh: 工艺、电压和温度的波动会引起时序变化，因此需要采用统计性测试生成方法来检测微小延迟故障（SDF）。对于随机生成的电路实例中的每一个故障 f，如果测试集均包含能够以该故障理论上最小可检测尺寸检测到 f 的测试向量，则称该测试集是鲁棒的。本文结合了统计性时延测试生成与基于确定性可满足性（SAT）的测试生成方法，以验证测试集的鲁棒性。由于基于SAT的算法仅针对统计方法未能覆盖的少量故障进行处理，其计算时间被大幅减少。实验结果表明，统计方法生成的测试集本身已具有极高的质量，只需通过SAT算法额外添加极少数测试向量即可。在此基础上进行测试集压缩，可在保持更高故障覆盖率的同时，进一步降低测试数据量。

title: PowerCourt: Formally Judging Benign-Looking Circuits in Multi-Tenant FPGA Environments
authors: Philipp Schmitz, Mohamed Shelkamy Ali, Dino Mehmedagić, Hassan Nassar, Jörg Henkel, Dominik Stoffel, Wolfgang Kunz
abstract: In the era of Cloud Computing and High Performance Computing as a Service, multiple customers run their software and hardware on the same physical devices. This opens new opportunities for attackers, like Denial of Service (DoS) attacks on shared cloud Field Programmable Gate Arrays (FP-GAs). DoS attacks work by employing a malicious hardware design as a tenant on a shared FP-GA device, draining the FPGA's power budget. This paper aims at identifying potentially malicious circuits before they are deployed to the FPGA, using formal verification. Our methodology, PowerCourt, provides an accurate worst-case power estimation based on switching activity. It computes metadata about the design that enables service providers to classify designs as malicious. The method checks formal properties that verify whether a design can exceed a custom threshold and whether this threshold can be exceeded repeatedly. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach using various hardware designs. For example, for a trojan that enables excessive switching, we show that we can detect it offline and disable it during runtime.
title_zh: PowerCourt：在多租户FPGA环境中对看似良性的电路进行正式判定
abstract_zh: 在云计算和高性能计算即服务的时代，多个客户在同一物理设备上运行其软件和硬件。这为攻击者带来了新的机会，例如针对共享云现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）的拒绝服务（DoS）攻击。此类攻击通过在共享FPGA设备上部署恶意硬件设计，耗尽FPGA的功耗预算来实现。本文旨在利用形式化验证，在恶意设计部署到FPGA之前识别潜在的恶意电路。我们提出的方法PowerCourt基于切换活动提供精确的最坏情况功耗估计，并计算有关设计的元数据，使服务提供商能够将设计分类为恶意或非恶意。该方法检查形式化属性，以验证设计是否可能超过自定义阈值，以及该阈值是否可能被反复超越。我们通过多种硬件设计验证了所提方法的有效性。例如，对于一个引发过度切换的硬件木马，我们证明了可以在线下检测到它，并在运行时将其禁用。

title: Case Study: Integrating RISC-V Zicfiss Shadow Stack Support for Control-Flow Integrity on the CVA6 Processor
authors: Behnam Farnaghinejad, Ernesto Sanchez
abstract: Control-flow integrity (CFI) is a fundamental defense against control-flow hijacking attacks that corrupt return addresses, and hardware-supported shadow stacks have been adopted in several mainstream processor architectures to provide backward-edge protection. The RISC-V Zicfiss extension introduces analogous CFI support into the RISC-V ecosystem, yet its practical integration into RISC-V processors remains largely unexplored. This paper presents a case study on integrating Zicfiss shadow stack support into the CVA6 processor, an opensource application-class RISC-V core representative of systems executing rich operating systems and user applications. The extension's architectural behavior is implemented and validated across privilege levels, establishing a correct and specificationaligned baseline for enforcing backward-edge CFI. This work enables a systematic study of control-flow protection mechanisms in advanced RISC-V designs. It provides a foundation for future investigations into robustness and hardening against physical and microarchitectural attack vectors.
title_zh: 案例研究：在CVA6处理器上集成RISC-V Zicfiss影子栈支持以实现控制流完整性
abstract_zh: 控制流完整性（CFI）是防御通过篡改返回地址实施控制流劫持攻击的一项基本机制，目前多种主流处理器架构已采用硬件支持的影子栈技术，以提供针对控制流后向边界的保护。RISC-V 的 Zicfiss 扩展将类似的 CFI 支持引入 RISC-V 生态系统，但其在 RISC-V 处理器中的实际集成仍鲜有探索。本文以 CVA6 处理器为案例，研究了 Zicfiss 影子栈支持的集成工作；CVA6 是一款开源的应用级 RISC-V 核心，代表了运行复杂操作系统和用户应用程序的系统。我们实现了该扩展在不同特权级下的体系结构行为，并进行了验证，建立了正确且符合规范的基线，以实现对后向边界控制流完整性的有效保护。本工作为在先进的 RISC-V 设计中系统性地研究控制流保护机制提供了基础，并为未来进一步探索针对物理层面及微架构攻击向量的鲁棒性与加固方案奠定了基础。

title: LPCG: A Capture Activity-Aware Technique for Low-Power Scan Testing
authors: Rohit Badjatya, Jaydev Bapat, Makoto Ikeda, Masahiro Fujita, Virendra Singh
abstract: As semiconductor technology advances to deepsubmicron nodes, power consumption during manufacturing test has become a critical design constraint. In particular, high switching activity during the capture phase of at-speed transition delay testing induces IR-drop and ground bounce, causing false failures and significant yield loss. This paper introduces Low-Power Capture Grouping (LPCG), a fine-grained scan-cell partitioning technique that directly mitigates capture power. LPCG uses a novel Capture Activity-Aware (CAA) algorithm to partition scan cells into segments by analysing fault-essential capture behavior across the full test set. Each segment is controlled by an in-chain Segment Control Bit (SCB) that enables per-pattern clock-gating. By activating only the minimal set of segments required to detect a given fault, LPCG substantially reduces simultaneous switching during capture. Compared to the state-of-the-art method, experiments using at-speed transition delay fault (TDF) patterns on ISCAS'89 benchmarks show LPCG achieves an average capture power reduction of 43.4%. This is achieved at the cost of an average 7.8% increase in test data volume and similar area overhead, demonstrating a practical trade-off for power-constrained VLSI testing.
title_zh: LPCG：一种面向低功耗扫描测试的捕获活动感知技术
abstract_zh: 随着半导体技术发展到深亚微米节点，制造测试期间的功耗已成为一个关键的设计约束。特别是在全速转换延迟测试的捕获阶段，高切换活动会引发IR压降和地弹（ground bounce），导致误判失效并造成显著的良率损失。本文提出了一种低功耗捕获分组（Low-Power Capture Grouping, LPCG）技术，该技术通过对扫描单元进行细粒度划分，直接降低捕获阶段的功耗。LPCG采用一种新颖的“捕获活动感知”（Capture Activity-Aware, CAA）算法，分析整个测试集中的故障关键型捕获行为，将扫描单元划分为多个段。每个段由链内的段控制位（Segment Control Bit, SCB）控制，实现按测试图形的时钟门控。通过仅激活检测特定故障所必需的最小段集合，LPCG显著减少了捕获阶段的同步切换活动。在ISCAS'89基准电路上使用全速转换延迟故障（TDF）测试图形的实验结果表明，与当前最先进的方法相比，LPCG平均可降低43.4%的捕获功耗。该方法的代价是测试数据量平均增加7.8%，面积开销相近，在功耗受限的VLSI测试中展现出实用的权衡效果。

title: Case Study: Exploring nMR Implementations for Energy Monitoring in Telecom Base Stations Under Non-Ionizing Radiation
authors: Elián Nevado, Jimmy Tarrillo
abstract: At elevated altitudes, increased neutron flux raises the risk of radiation-induced soft errors, compromising critical systems. This work evaluates coarse-grained N-modular redundancy (3, 5, and 7MR) with Hamming-protected instruction memory in a PicoBlaze soft-core for telecom power monitoring. Runtime fault injection on an Artix-7 FPGA assesses reliability, logic utilization, and power consumption. Results show significant gains up to 5 MR, while 7 MR yields marginal improvements relative to its hardware and energy cost, confirming diminishing returns in redundancy scaling. These results highlight reliabil-ity-cost trade-offs in resource-constrained FPGA applications.
title_zh: 案例研究：在非电离辐射环境下探索用于电信基站能耗监测的nMR实现方案
abstract_zh: 在高海拔地区，中子通量增加会提高辐射导致软错误的风险，从而危及关键系统。本文研究了在用于电信电源监控的PicoBlaze软核处理器中，采用汉明码保护指令存储器的粗粒度N模冗余（3、5和7模冗余）技术。通过在Artix-7 FPGA上进行运行时故障注入，评估了系统的可靠性、逻辑资源占用率和功耗。结果表明，冗余度提升至5模时可靠性显著增强，而7模冗余相对于其硬件与能耗代价仅带来微小改进，显示出冗余扩展的收益递减效应。这些结果凸显了在资源受限的FPGA应用中可靠性与成本之间的权衡关系。

title: Embedded Tutorial: Security in Reconfigurable Scan Networks
authors: Joel Åhlund, Markus Törmänen, Erik Larsson
abstract: Reconfigurable scan networks (RSNs) provide efficient and flexible access to on-chip logic, such as instruments for test and diagnostics, throughout a semiconductor's lifetime. Test instruments are powerful, as they provide high controllability and observability. The availability of a high number of test instruments, as well as the standardized and easy access, makes RSNs a valuable target for an adversary. With the goal of exploiting the instruments to perform more advanced attacks. Without any security measures in place, the attacker can access the RSN directly over the test port. On top of this, the extensive use of third-party IP and untrusted actors in the semiconductor supply chain opens up for malicious logic to be injected into the device, so called hardware trojans, causing a risk of attacks from within the RSN itself. In this embedded tutorial, we cover the risks related to RSNs, and discuss mitigation strategies to protect against attacks.
title_zh: 嵌入式教程：可重构扫描网络中的安全性
abstract_zh: 可重构扫描网络（RSN）在整个半导体生命周期内，为片上逻辑（例如用于测试和诊断的仪器）提供了高效且灵活的访问方式。测试仪器功能强大，能够提供高度的可控性和可观测性。然而，大量测试仪器的存在以及标准化、便捷的访问机制，也使RSN成为攻击者极具吸引力的目标，其意图是利用这些仪器实施更高级别的攻击。若未采取任何安全措施，攻击者可直接通过测试端口访问RSN。此外，半导体供应链中广泛使用第三方IP核及不可信参与方，可能导致恶意逻辑（即所谓的硬件木马）被植入芯片内部，从而引发来自RSN内部的安全攻击风险。在本篇嵌入式教程中，我们将探讨与RSN相关的安全风险，并讨论用于防范此类攻击的缓解策略。

title: Design and Reliability Analysis of a Pipeline RISC-V Processor Core
authors: Douglas A. Santos, Wesley Grignani, Carolina Imianosky, Douglas R. Melo, Luigi Dilillo
abstract: Reliability and performance are key design concerns for embedded processors deployed in space and safety-critical environments. This work enhances our previously developed Hardened RISC-V System-on-Chip (HARV-SoC) by implementing a pipelined architecture. This implementation improves execution efficiency while keeping the design straightforward to avoid reliability issues. Although the pipeline enhances performance, it entails trade-offs between performance and reliability, depending on the design options chosen. We present a detailed analysis by performing fault-injection simulations in the processor core that model the effects of Single-Event Upsets (SEUs) on the core's flip-flop elements, and by estimating the effects in future irradiation experiments. The results provide valuable insights into the processor's robustness and identify the critical elements for future hardening implementations targeting specific architectural components.
title_zh: RISC-V流水线处理器核心的设计与可靠性分析
abstract_zh: 可靠性和性能是应用于太空及安全关键环境的嵌入式处理器设计中的关键考虑因素。本文在我们先前开发的加固型RISC-V片上系统（HARV-SoC）基础上，通过实现流水线架构对其进行增强。该实现方式在提升执行效率的同时，保持了设计的简洁性，以避免引发可靠性问题。尽管流水线结构提升了性能，但其性能与可靠性之间存在权衡，具体取决于所选择的设计方案。我们通过对处理器核心进行故障注入仿真，模拟单粒子翻转（SEU）对核心触发器元件的影响，并结合对未来辐照实验效果的预估，开展了详细分析。研究结果为评估处理器的鲁棒性提供了有价值的见解，并明确了未来针对特定架构组件进行加固设计时所需关注的关键元件。

title: LA-SCG: Layout-Aware Scan Chain Grouping for Peak Shift Power and IR-Drop Mitigation in Scan-Based Testing
authors: Rohit Badjatya, Harsh Gupta, Makoto Ikeda, Masahiro Fujita, Virendra Singh
abstract: The exponential growth of VLSI technology has significantly increased the number of transistors per chip, exacerbating the challenge of elevated peak power in scan-based testing during scan shift operations. Excessive peak shift power can induce IR-drop and shift-timing violations, leading to yield loss by causing good chips to fail. This paper proposes a novel Layout-Aware Scan Chain Grouping (LA-SCG) technique that leverages physical layout information to optimize scan chain grouping. Unlike prior approaches, the proposed method statically partitions scan chains into groups with a balanced distribution of switching activity and spatial proximity, thereby minimizing localized IR-drop. By combining these balanced groups with a multi-duty cycle clocking scheme, the proposed method mitigates localized peak power while preserving the original test application time. Experimental results on ISCAS-89 and ITC-99 benchmark circuits show that LA-SCG achieves a peak shift power reduction of up to 57.7% compared to state-of-the-art techniques, with hardware overhead limited to a multiphase clock generator.
title_zh: LA-SCG：面向基于扫描的测试中峰值移位功耗和IR压降缓解的布局感知扫描链分组
abstract_zh: VLSI技术的指数级增长显著增加了每个芯片上的晶体管数量，这加剧了基于扫描测试在扫描移位操作期间峰值功耗过高的挑战。过高的移位峰值功耗会导致IR压降和移位时序违规，从而引起良品芯片失效，造成良率损失。本文提出了一种新颖的布局感知扫描链分组（LA-SCG）技术，该方法利用物理布局信息来优化扫描链的分组。与以往的方法不同，所提出的技术通过静态地将扫描链划分为切换活动分布均衡且空间位置邻近的组，从而最小化局部区域的IR压降。通过将这些均衡的分组与多占空比时钟方案相结合，该方法在保持原有测试应用时间的同时，有效缓解了局部峰值功耗问题。在ISCAS-89和ITC-99基准电路上的实验结果表明，与现有先进技术相比，LA-SCG可实现最高达57.7%的移位峰值功耗降低，硬件开销仅限于一个多相时钟发生器。

title: Resilience Analysis of a Fault-Tolerant MPSoC Interconnection Architecture Under SEU Fault Injection
authors: Thiago H. Rausch, Wesley Grignani, Luigi Dilillo, Douglas R. Melo
abstract: The reliability of on-chip communication is a key enabler for dependable Multiprocessor System-on-Chip (MPSoC) platforms operating in radiation-harsh environments. This work investigates the fault-tolerance of the eXtensible Interconnect Network Architecture (XINA), a configurable Network-on-Chip (NoC) integrated with an AMBA AXI-compatible Network Interface (NI), both of which employ Triple Modular Redundancy (TMR) in the control logic and Hamming Error-Correcting Codes (ECC) in the data buffers. The evaluation focuses on the interconnection fabric of a <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathbf{1 0} \times \mathbf{1 0 ~ M P S o C}$</tex> prototype composed of <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathbf{1 0 0}$</tex> routers and <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathbf{1 0 0}$</tex> AXI-connected cores, where manager and subordinate IPs act as traffic generators and monitors data integrity under full load. A large-scale fault-injection campaign comprising <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathbf{1, 0 0 0}$</tex> simulations with Single-Event Upset (SEU) injections was conducted to assess the impact of fault-tolerant mechanisms across four hardening configurations. The results demonstrate improved reliability, with the fully protected architecture achieving an <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathbf{8 7. 2 \%}$</tex> reduction in observed errors relative to the baseline while maintaining stable throughput and data integrity across all tests.
title_zh: 单粒子翻转故障注入下容错多处理器片上系统互连架构的弹性分析
abstract_zh: 片上通信的可靠性是确保多处理器系统芯片（MPSoC）平台在强辐射环境中稳定运行的关键因素。本文研究了可扩展互连网络架构（XINA）的容错能力，该架构是一种可配置的片上网络（NoC），集成了兼容AMBA AXI协议的网络接口（NI），其控制逻辑采用三模冗余（TMR），数据缓冲区则采用汉明纠错码（ECC）。评估基于一个由100个路由器和100个AXI连接核心组成的10×10 MPSoC原型互连结构展开，其中管理器和从属IP模块作为流量生成器并在满负载下监控数据完整性。通过大规模故障注入实验，共进行了1000次单粒子翻转（SEU）注入仿真，评估四种不同加固配置下容错机制的有效性。实验结果表明，系统的可靠性显著提升：与基准配置相比，全面保护的架构观测到的错误减少了87.2%，且在所有测试中均保持了稳定的吞吐量和数据完整性。

title: Mitigation of SETs Under Process Variability Effects: Circuit-Level Strategies for Reliable Design
authors: Marina L. Dias, Bernardo B. Sandoval, Paulo F. Butzen, Ricardo A. L. Reis, Cristina Meinhardt
abstract: This paper investigates the combined effects of process variability and radiation on a set of circuit-level hardening techniques. We assess the radiation robustness of hardened inverter topologies by examining the critical Linear Energy Transfer Threshold (LETth) for different fault configurations and process variability scenarios. The simulations incorporate variations in the number of fins and statistical process parameters to evaluate how these factors influence the robustness, energy consumption, and delay of hardened topologies. The results discuss the trade-offs involved in designing reliable FinFET circuits that operate under both process variability and radiation environments. Additionally, the impact of implementing these strategies in a RISC-V processor is discussed, indicating that introducing these approaches in the arithmetic blocks has a negligible effect on area, power, and delay, while potentially enhancing the overall robustness of the arithmetic units.
title_zh: 工艺变化影响下的单粒子瞬态缓解：面向可靠设计的电路级策略
abstract_zh: 本文研究了工艺变异性和辐射对一系列电路级加固技术的综合影响。通过分析不同故障配置和工艺变异性场景下关键的线性能量转移阈值（LETth），评估了加固型反相器拓扑结构的抗辐射能力。仿真中考虑了鳍片数量的变化以及统计工艺参数的波动，以评估这些因素对加固拓扑结构鲁棒性、能耗和延迟的影响。研究结果探讨了在同时存在工艺变异和辐射环境条件下，设计可靠FinFET电路所需权衡的关键问题。此外，本文还讨论了将这些策略应用于RISC-V处理器的影响，结果表明，在算术逻辑单元中引入这些方法对面积、功耗和延迟的影响可忽略不计，同时有望显著提升算术单元的整体可靠性。

title: Fast Statistical Estimation of Circuit-Level Cross Section Considering Logical Masking Effects
authors: Clayton R. Farias, Tiago R. Balen, Paulo F. Butzen
abstract: The technology scaling in the semiconductor industry increases the susceptibility of integrated circuits to radiation, especially to single-event effects in planar processes. The circuit vulnerability can be evaluated using the cross section metric. Determining the cross section requires an expensive radiation test. Therefore, predicting the circuit susceptibility, even at the cost of accuracy, enables early design choices to reduce the expected error rate of an electronic system intended for deployment in radiation environments. This work presents a fast statistical procedure for circuit-level cross section estimation. The procedure explores the sensitive areas of the circuit logic gates according to the input vectors. It also evaluates the impact of logical masking on the effectively estimated cross section of the combinational circuits. By exploring the impact of logical masking in the benchmarks ISCAS85, EPFL15, and ITC99, the results indicate an overestimation of the cross section of up to 50%.
title_zh: 考虑逻辑屏蔽效应的电路级截面快速统计估计
abstract_zh: 半导体行业中的技术微缩增加了集成电路对辐射的敏感性，尤其是在平面工艺中对单粒子效应更为敏感。电路的脆弱性可通过截面（cross section）指标进行评估。确定该截面需要昂贵的辐射测试。因此，即使以牺牲一定精度为代价，提前预测电路的敏感性仍有助于在设计早期做出优化选择，从而降低部署于辐射环境中的电子系统的预期错误率。本文提出了一种用于电路级截面估算的快速统计方法。该方法根据输入向量分析电路逻辑门的敏感区域，并评估逻辑屏蔽效应对组合电路有效截面估算的影响。通过对 ISCAS85、EPFL15 和 ITC99 等基准电路进行实验分析，结果表明，若不考虑逻辑屏蔽效应，截面估算可能高估高达 50%。
